recommendations.title: Tune in for Love
recommendations.overview: During the 1990s, hardworking Mi-soo and optimistic Hyun-woo meet at a bakery and fall in love while exchanging stories on a radio station, but while their paths keep crossing, the timing never seems to work out.

recommendations.title: A Bittersweet Life
recommendations.overview: Kim Sun-woo is an enforcer and manager for a hotel owned by a cold, calculative crime boss, Kang who assigns Sun-woo to a simple errand while he is away on a business trip; to shadow his young mistress, Hee-soo, for fear that she may be cheating on h

recommendations.title: Deranged
recommendations.overview: People binge eat and suffer from extreme thirst, which leads them to go crazy for water. They cannot control themselves because they are brainwashed by a parasite.

recommendations.title: The Terror Live
recommendations.overview: A newsman discovers he's been rigged with a bomb after he has an exclusive interview with a terrorist who blew up a bridge.

recommendations.title: Hot Young Bloods
recommendations.overview: A comedy romance movie about the last generation of youths and their passionate romance based in Hongseong, Chungcheong Namdo in the 1980s.

recommendations.title: Ballerina
recommendations.overview: Grieving the loss of a best friend she couldn't protect, an ex-bodyguard sets out to fulfill her dear friend's last wish: sweet revenge.

recommendations.title: The Way Home
recommendations.overview: This is the story of a 7-year-old boy, Sang-woo, born and raised in the big city, and his mute grandmother, who has spent her whole life in a small rural village.

recommendations.title: Badland Hunters
recommendations.overview: After a deadly earthquake turns Seoul into a lawless badland, a fearless huntsman springs into action to rescue a teenager abducted by a mad doctor.

recommendations.title: Fukushima 50
recommendations.overview: Workers at the Fukushima Daiichi facility in Japan risk their lives and stay at the nuclear power plant to prevent total destruction after the region is devastated by an earthquake and tsunami in 2011.

recommendations.title: A Frozen Flower
recommendations.overview: A historical drama set in the Koryo dynasty and focused on the relationship between a king and his bodyguard.
